allow: Bash(git init && git add src/ index.html vite.config.ts tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.node.json package.json package-lock.json eslint.config.js public/)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial implementation of CES Designer

Pure ECS architecture with a render pipeline \(Shape → Modifier → Style → Effect\).
Entities are plain IDs; any component combination is allowed.

- ECS core: World, Component base class, EventBus
- 6 prop types: Number, Color, String, Bool, Enum, Vec2 \(self-contained with React editors\)
- 10 components: Rect/Circle/Text shapes, Transform/Fill/Stroke/Shadow/Opacity styles, Cloner/Mirror modifiers
- Canvas 2D renderer driven by DrawItem pipeline
- Unity-style UI: Scene Tree \(left\), Viewport \(center\), Inspector \(right\)
- Demo scene with radially cloned circles and a rect on startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/yortuc/tual.git && git branch -M main && git push -u origin main)
Bash(git remote set-url origin git@github.com:yortuc/tual.git && git push -u origin main)
Bash(npm run build 2>&1 | grep -v "node_modules" | grep "error TS" | grep -v "TS1294\\|TS6133\\|TS2769")

Bash(git add src/__tests__/components/modifiers.test.ts src/__tests__/ecs/World.test.ts src/__tests__/integration/pipeline.test.ts src/components/modifiers/GridClonerComponent.ts src/components/modifiers/LinearClonerComponent.ts src/components/modifiers/RadialClonerComponent.ts src/ecs/Component.ts src/editor/componentRegistry.ts src/editor/demo.ts src/editor/presets.ts src/ui/Inspector.tsx src/ui/Viewport.tsx src/components/distributors/ src/components/modifiers/ClonerComponent.ts)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Separate Cloner from Distributor — cleaner pipeline architecture

ClonerComponent \(Modifier\) purely multiplies items; RadialDistributor,
LinearDistributor, and GridDistributor \(Distributor stage\) handle spatial
positioning by index. Inspector warns when Cloner has no Distributor.
Viewport tracks itemCount progressively so distributor gizmos know how
many dots to render. All presets, demo, and tests updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/ui/PreviewCanvas.tsx src/ui/Inspector.tsx src/components/distributors/PhyllotaxisDistributor.ts src/components/distributors/SpiralDistributor.ts src/editor/bundles.ts src/editor/componentRegistry.ts src/ecs/Command.ts src/ecs/World.ts src/ecs/Component.ts src/components/styles/TransformComponent.ts src/props/NumberProp.tsx src/editor/Serializer.ts src/__tests__/components/styles.test.ts 2>&1 && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add live mini thumbnail previews to Add Component menu

- Add PreviewCanvas component: offscreen Canvas2D renderer that runs a
  fresh World pipeline, auto-centers and auto-scales items to a square thumbnail
- Redesign AddComponentMenu page 2 as a 3-column grid of preview cards,
  each showing a live rendered preview of the component/bundle
- Remove ColorRampComponent \(reverted in favour of HSL RampSignal bundles\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add README.md docs/tual_2.png && git status 2>&1)

    \("src/components/signals/NoiseSignal.ts",

     "new NumberProp\('Max',     { default: 1,   min: -100, max: 100, step: 0.01, shortLabel: 'Hi'  }\)"\),
]

changed = {}
for path, old, new in replacements:
    with open\(path, 'r'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    if old in content:
        content = content.replace\(old, new\)
        with open\(path, 'w'\) as f:
            f.write\(content\)
        changed[path] = changed.get\(path, 0\) + 1
    else:
        print\(f"NOT FOUND in {path}: {old[:60]}"\)

for path, count in sorted\(changed.items\(\)\):
    print\(f"  {count} replacement\(s\): {path}"\)
PYEOF)
